operational_scenes.scene_title: Discussion on Recurring Issues in Support
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Address the problem of recurring issues in support processes
operational_intents: Identify the challenge of recurring issues
Emphasize that recurring issues should be prevented
Highlight the need for effective support actions
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract problem identification and prevention emphasis
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on recurring issue recognition and prevention
